title: Code Review verdict: REQUEST_CHANGES on telemetry PII remediation (f793188)
description: The PII egress remediation is strong (capture default-off + gated), but redactPII at src/lib/telemetry.ts:46 has a verified bypass: the canonical US phone format '(555) 123-4567' (and '+1 (...)') is NOT redacted because the regex permits only one separator between digits. This leaks when LIGHTTRACK_CAPTURE_IO is enabled. One-line fix ([\s().-]{0,2}) + a regression test clears it.

title: README pre-0.2.13 drift: Supabase narrative vs Firestore/PGlite + missing billing/auth routes
description: While syncing README for 0.2.13, I found drift that predates this release (shipped in 0.2.12) and intentionally did NOT fabricate fixes for it: (1) README still narrates a Supabase auth + DATABASE_URL story, but .env.example now exposes DB_DRIVER, PGLITE_PATH, FIRESTORE_PROJECT_ID, NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* and LLM_PROVIDER/Claude-CLI engine vars — suggesting a Firestore/PGlite + switchable-LLM direction. (2) The Routes table is missing /login, /billing, and the Polar webhook endpoint. A focused reconciliation pass is warranted, ideally confirming the actual auth+DB architecture from code before rewriting the narrative.
